---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an algorithm, workflow, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem should this feature solve?

## Proposed approach

Describe the algorithm or workflow idea.

## Alternatives considered

Mention simpler approaches or why they may not be enough.

## False-positive / risk analysis

If this changes cleaning behavior, where could it accidentally damage valid text?

## Test idea

How can we test this without committing copyrighted text?
